## Description

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What happens instead.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., iOS 18, Android 15, macOS 15]
- App version: [e.g., 0.1.0]

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots.
